name: Koryo Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Koryo Electronics Co., Ltd. engages in the production, sale, and import/export of electronic parts and components, and computers and computer peripherals. It also imports/exports electric appliances and components, such as TV sets, video and radio cassette recorders, air conditioners, refrigerators, and microwave ovens; and acts as an agent for related products of Taiwan and international companies on sales, bids, and quotes. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
